## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to …
2. Click on …
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
